scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.setup: cd backend && python -m venv venv && .\venv\Scripts\pip.exe install -r requirements.txt && .\venv\Scripts\python.exe -m playwright install chromium && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd .. && npm install
scripts.setup:backend: cd backend && python -m venv venv && .\venv\Scripts\pip.exe install -r requirements.txt && .\venv\Scripts\python.exe -m playwright install chromium
